reviews.author: Flyer13696210721
reviews.en: Super nice park! - Super nice park! Different from the ‘average’ climbing parks. Here you can choose a catapult or swing. We were 4 boys (16 & 18) and they enjoyed it. You can drink and buy ice cream. Nice guidance.
reviews.hr: Super park — drugačiji od prosječnih penjačkih parkova. Možete odabrati katapultu ili ljuljačku. Bila su četiri dečka od 16 i 18 godina i uživali su. Možete popiti piće i kupiti sladoled između aktivnosti. Odlično vodstvo.

reviews.author: Typingalong22
reviews.en: Great fun - A great attraction park in Croatia, was really fun to look around and see all of the different attractions. Really fun activity and would recommend to any thrill seekers visiting the Istrian peninsula.
reviews.hr: Odličan avanturistički park u Hrvatskoj — zabavno je istraživati sve atrakcije. Toplo preporučujem svim ljubiteljima adrenalina na Istarskom poluotoku.

reviews.author: Sandra
reviews.en: A horny day !!!!! 100% Recommended!!!! - It was a great day for our son (15 years) full of really great experiences and an extra portion of ADRENALIN! The staff on site were super nice, helpful and always on hand. The human catapult (just under 100km fast) was a unique experience and worth visiting the park for (once in all Croatia). But also the 12 meter high swing (3G Swing), the 120 meter long zipline at 30 meters height, the free fall from 20 meters and several other attractions make the park a real experience. We can recommend it 100%!!!!
reviews.hr: Dan pun adrenalina za našeg 15-godišnjaka! Osoblje je bilo super, korisno i uvijek dostupno. Ljudska katapulta sama po sebi vrijedi posjeta — jedinstvena u Hrvatskoj. Ljuljačka od 12 m, zipline od 120 m na 30 m visine i slobodan pad s 20 m čine pravo iskustvo. 100% preporuka!

reviews.author: Cruiser20282053316
reviews.en: Amazing - We had a great experience at the park! The instructors were friendly and gave clear instructions. And in the end we got some nice and cold softdrinks
reviews.hr: Odlično iskustvo u parku! Instruktori su bili ljubazni i dali jasne upute. Na kraju smo dobili i hladno piće.

reviews.author: Piccolop126
reviews.en: . - This was an amazing experience..!!! The crew is amazing and the activities are great! Good stuff to do, thanks guys
reviews.hr: Ovo je bilo nevjerojatno iskustvo! Ekipa je super, a aktivnosti su odlične. Ima puno toga za raditi — hvala ekipi.

reviews.author: Renate V.
reviews.en: Great day! - 5 years ago we had a great day here. Yesterday we went back with our daughters, who are now 14, 12 and 10 years old. It was amazing! The children now dared even more. The oldest even did the catapult. What a victory! Staff is also really patient and friendly. Also very helpful if things don't work out. The youngest couldn't get enough of it and made good use of every minute we were there. Thanks for this wonderful day! When we are in the area again, we will definitely come back!
reviews.hr: Vratili smo se s kćerima, sada 14, 12 i 10 godina. Najstarija je čak probala katapultu — prava pobjeda! Osoblje je stvarno strpljivo i ljubazno, vrlo korisno kad nešto ne uspije odmah. Mlađa nije mogla dočekati ponovno. Hvala na prekrasan dan — sigurno se vraćamo!

reviews.author: Pieter G.
reviews.en: Great fun - Fun park fantastic staff. We had a great time in the park. Nice climbing and fun catapult. We enjoyed this during our summer holiday
reviews.hr: Zabavan park, fantastično osoblje. Odlično smo se proveli — lijepo penjanje i zabavna katapulta. Uživali smo tijekom ljetnog odmora.

reviews.author: Margot K.
reviews.en: Nice day out! - We drove here with our kids (10, 8 and 6) on a less sunny day. We expected to be one of the many tourists, but we were one of the few: very nice. Good explanation and support. You start with the route at 2 meters and can go to 6 and 9. Fun and challenging for our eldest 2. The youngest had fun on the lowest route. Then together in the giant swing. It was a great day. And because you only pay for the routes you do, it is very affordable. And if you come back within a week, you didn't have to pay again for the attractions you had already done. Staff also calm and helpful.
reviews.hr: Došli smo s djecom od 10, 8 i 6 godina. Odlična objašnjenja i podrška na stazama, zatim zajedno na veliku ljuljačku. Plaćate samo ono što radite, što je vrlo pristupačno. Mirno, korisno osoblje — sjajan dan.

reviews.author: Georg B.
reviews.en: Great attractions! - Been here for the second time. It's great! Nigel's team is very accommodating and competent. We had spent a few hours here. Fully recommended. We will come back!
reviews.hr: Drugi put ovdje — odlično je! Nigelov tim je vrlo susretljiv i stručan. Potpuna preporuka. Vratit ćemo se!

reviews.author: Skipper479
reviews.en: A wonderful day - We spent a lovely day with two children (9 and 12 years) here. The staff is very friendly and helpful. Anyone can make one or the other attraction (or all) at their discretion and also decide gradually.
reviews.hr: Proveli smo divan dan s dvoje djece od 9 i 12 godina. Osoblje je vrlo ljubazno i korisno. Svaki može isprobati atrakcije vlastitim tempom.
